differentials.name: no air trapping with proximal interruption of pulmonary artery
differentials.raw: no air trapping with proximal interruption of pulmonary artery (no hilum)

context: small ipsilateral hilum ← diminuted hilar vessels + attenuated arteries) | small hemithorax with decreased volume | normal hyperexpanded hemithorax ← collateral air drift | air trapping during expiration
